name: Lotus - Your Alpha Lopunny
description:
"Who are you? Do you want to be a friend? Maybe my mate?!"

While spending the day searching for new Pokémon to add to your own party, you stumble across a massive Alpha Lopunny.

Lotus, the Alpha Lopunny is currently looking for a mate, and (un?)fortunately for you, it seems she's become quite enamored with you.. How will you handle this?

Update 03/08/2026: Added a second intro message as well as a blank scenario as a means of getting myself back into making these bots! Hope you enjoy it!

Bonus Image

1st Bot

This is my first bot, at first it wasn't too well put together as I was still getting used to making bots, but I've since got better and decided a little upgrade to my first bot!

I hope you enjoy this update to the bot!
creator: ShiningCrescent
